char.lde.name: Lee Do-eun
lde.clientline.idle.1: I'm so tired, even just sitting here feels nice...
lde.clientline.idle.2: Don't bother if you're not gonna do it, just don't make noise...
lde.clientline.best.2: I mean, you're actually good at it...
lde.clientline.good.1: Can you do it a little harder?
lde.clientline.good.2: Hey, keep going a bit more...
lde.clientline.bad.1: Kinda feel like it's making it worse...
lde.clientline.bad.2: ...You're not doing this just because you want to touch me, right?
char.yjh.name: <size=-10>Yeon Ju-hyang</size>
yjh.clientline.idle.1: Getting shy on me? That's cute.
yjh.clientline.best.1: Oh, right there! That's the spot!
yjh.clientline.best.2: Mmm~ not bad. That was exactly where it was knotted up.
yjh.clientline.better.1: You're better at this than I thought!
yjh.clientline.better.2: Getting a massage from my senior... feels pretty good actually-
yjh.clientline.good.1: Come on, put some elbow into it! Since when do you hold back?
yjh.clientline.good.2: That's nice too, but could you go a bit higher?
yjh.clientline.normal.1:
(She's trying so hard... that's cute-
Terrible technique anyway.)
yjh.clientline.bad.1: Heh, let's just say I'm the more gifted one when it comes to massage.
yjh.clientline.bad.2: Well, since we're here, feel free to practice all you want~
char.ssa.name: Seon Su-a
rule.miss.title: Miss
rule.miss.description: Fails any of the above conditions.
rule.miss.comment.yjh:
"Oh."
"Well? Feel any better?"
"Not even a little bit."
rule.miss.comment.lde:
"The shoulder — I said massage the shoulder-"
"Oh, I'm just touching wherever I feel like."
"?"
rule.strike.title: Answer
rule.strike.comment.lde:
"This is just perfect,
I've basically elevated massage to an art form-"
"Calm down..."
rule.semi-strike.title: Congruence
rule.semi-strike.comment.lde:
"Not bad, right? Pretty good?"
"Not there... I said my right side..."
"Wasn't that my right side?"
rule.semi-strike.comment.yjh:
"No, the other side — MY right-"
"Getting the exact opposite side basically counts as a hit."
"Huh?"
rule.ball.title: Existence
rule.ball.comment.lde:
"Can you try to be more consistent — stop going back and forth."
"Nope. I'll do it however I want."
"Fine... do whatever you want..."
rule.ball.comment.yjh:
"It's all good, but it feels like you're jumping around too much..."
"Ah whatever, just do it loosely."
"..."
rule.parity-match.title: Parity
rule.parity-match.comment.lde:
"Does that feel good?"
"Kind of? Kind of not?..."
""
rule.parity-match.comment.yjh:
"Ooh... that's nice."
"Doesn't seem like much of a reaction for something 'nice.'"
"(Sharp as ever)"
rule.range-match.title: Approximation
rule.range-match.description: At that position, off by exactly 1.
rule.range-match.comment.yjh:
"A little higher." "Here?"
"Not that high." "Here?"
"Just a tiny bit lower." "You wanna get hit?"
rule.greater-than.title: Floor
rule.greater-than.description: At that position, a higher number is needed.
rule.greater-than.comment.lde:
"I think you can go a bit harder."
"Okay, going all out-"
"waitwaitwaitwait"
rule.less-than.title: Ceiling
rule.less-than.description: At that position, a lower number is needed.
rule.less-than.comment.lde:
"Can you just, take it easy? Ahh-"
"It's fine, you have to go hard to work out the knot- oh, that's a bruise."
"Hey."
rule.ghost.title: Exclusion
rule.ghost.description: A number that is NOT in the answer.
rule.ghost.comment.yjh:
"That spot is terrible, seriously terrible!"
"Well... where else do you want me to go then?"
"I dunno, just — not there. Total out."
tutorial.basic.0:
Welcome to the world of massage! 

This tutorial will explain the basic rules.
tutorial.basic.1: To complete a massage, you must massage exactly 4 out of 10 massage points (numbered 0 to 9), with no repeats, in the correct order.
tutorial.basic.2: In other words, the goal is to guess <u>a 4-digit number with no repeating digits</u>.
tutorial.basic.3: First, check the History File on the right. (Hover over the area to continue)
tutorial.basic.4:
Here you can see a record of each massage attempt.
Each log entry contains the massage points tried and the feedback received.
tutorial.basic.5: To start, let's massage Point 1. (Press the number 1 to continue)
tutorial.basic.6: A feedback for Point 1 has appeared. You can check what it means in the Rule File.
tutorial.basic.7: Check the Rule File on the left. (Hover over the area to continue)
tutorial.basic.8: The Rule File lists various massage rules. Rules are applied from top to bottom, in priority order.
tutorial.basic.9: The feedback from earlier matched the second rule from the top: Congruence.
tutorial.basic.10: That means you massaged the right position, but the point was off by 5.
tutorial.basic.11: Looks like the correct point for the first position was Point 6.
tutorial.basic.12: Now let's move on to the second point. (Hover over the area to continue)
tutorial.basic.13: Let's massage Point 3. (Press the number 3 to continue)
tutorial.basic.15: You can always check the meaning of feedback in the Rule File.
tutorial.basic.16: You can also click again while a file is open to pin it to the screen at any time.
tutorial.basic.17: Repeat this process to figure out all 4 digits, and the massage is complete!
tutorial.basic.18:
Try to complete the massage within the given number of attempts.
Each time you succeed, you'll move on to the next level.
tutorial.basic.19:
Each level has a new combination of rules waiting for you.
Be sure to check the Rule File every time you reach a new level!
p0.2.3: Currently returning from a 7-day field deployment.
p0.3.0: Multiple minor bruises across the body,
p0.5.1: even best case it won't end till 9...)
p0.7.1: I should just catch a few minutes of sleep in the break room...)
p0.12.0: Likewise returning from a 7-day field deployment.
p0.13.0: Sustained multiple bruises and fractures during the operation,
p0.15.0: In the male employee break room?
p0.19.0: But seriously, why are you here?
p0.19.1: Don't you have to go to the debrief soon?
p0.20.1: obviously they're gonna have all the 3rd-rateds check equipment counts,
p0.20.3: Do all their own stuff first and let us out whenever they feel like it.
p0.21.3: Back in my day if you didn't tally your gear on the way back-
p0.25.2: how are you already looking so fresh?
p0.26.1: I showered right when I got here...
p0.26.2: At least take off your gear and wash your face or something.
p0.31.1: who wipes someone down with a dishcloth...!
p0.32.1: It's my personal towel, so it's clean!
p0.33.1: I'll do it myself, I will!
p0.36.1: I really have to take some rest now...
p0.38.1: I'm not kicking you out, just don't bother me...
p1.6.1: You hit me out of nowhere while I was sleeping!
p1.6.2: Of course I'm gonna wake up!!!
p1.7.2: I figured I'd give you a little massage...
p1.8.0: But you wouldn't wake up even when I kneaded pretty hard...
p1.8.1: So I thought, maybe you were dead...
p1.9.0: What kind of nonsense is that?!
p1.9.1: If you think someone's dead, your first move is to hit them?!
p1.19.2: You were massaging me while I was asleep?
p1.20.0: Oh~ did all the fatigue just melt away?
p1.20.1: I've got a bit of a gift for massage, you know.
p1.21.0: You're weirdly talented at everything physical...
p1.25.2: Gotta put my junior to good use sometimes.
p1.25.3: You don't have to do it if you don't want to-
p1.26.0: You think I'd pass up a chance to put my hands all over you?
p1.34.0: Excuse me? Even if it was, who actually says that out loud!
p1.35.0: Well, a feedback should be accurate-
p1.37.0: What are you two doing here?
p1.37.1: Shouldn't you be at the debrief.
p1.37.2: The others were looking for you two.
p1.39.0: Somehow it looks like we were the only ones slacking off.
p1.43.0: We got to go home early, how is that a bad ending.
p1.49.0: Huh? That's a pretty lukewarm reaction.
p1.50.1: You are actually good at this...
p1.53.0: (After just a few pokes, she's been hitting every knot dead-on..!)
p1.55.0: (How many minutes has it been already?
p1.55.1: Honestly I want her to keep going!
p1.55.2: But that feels like too much to ask...)
p1.56.0: (After playing it so cool, if I let this drag on,
p1.60.0: I-I'll do it now. My turn.
p2.4.0: (This is way more embarrassing than I expected...
p2.4.1: Why did I agree to this?
p2.4.2: Should've just kept getting the massage...)
p2.9.0: If you're just gonna fidget with my arm, why even have me lie down...
p2.13.0: Don't tell me you got shy now that it's actually happening-
p2.14.1: I'll do your back! The back!
p2.26.1: hands that have no idea what they're doing,
p2.27.0: And then the face that can't hide the pride whenever it seems like I'm enjoying it!
p2.29.1: is this why people get massages from their kids?
p2.29.2: Even though it's barely working, it's genuinely great for your mental health.
p2.31.1: I'm seriously going to sleep now!
p2.34.0: Bad Ending 2: too shy to take some complements...
p2.35.1: It's Bad Ending 2: Being rude to your senior!
p2.41.1: I can be good at things, why?
p2.42.1: I figured you'd be all flustered and fumbling around,
p2.42.2: but you're actually hitting the right spots pretty well.
p2.43.0: And the way you're trying so hard even with the lack of strength is kinda cute too.
p2.44.0: ...Is that an insult or a compliment?
p2.47.0: Hurry up! Lie down like before!
p3.3.2: Say my massage is the best!
p3.5.0: So this is your weak spot, huh?
p3.6.1: but I'm not gonna make strange noise like you-
p3.7.0: <size=+30>WHEN DID I EVER MAKE STRANGE NOISE</size>
p3.8.0: More accurately, the sound of holding it in?
p3.10.0: I'll make you so hooked on my hands you won't know what to do without them
p3.12.0: I wonder if you could possibly match a massage this satisfying?
p3.12.1: For just a little girl like you?!
p3.18.0: Giving a massage is lowkey a workout,
p3.19.1: we should do this again sometime!
p3.20.0: What even is a Massage Battle...
p3.20.2: Haven't we been here a while?
p3.24.1: 'Due to repairs at the equipment storage facility, today's operation E-680A debrief-
p3.25.0: has been concluded with individual equipment return and an abbreviated field debrief.'
p3.28.1: basically the people who stayed in the break room with no reason.
p3.29.0: ...at this point I might as well change and just sleep here...
p3.32.0: Well, getting a massage while wearing a bodysuit — no wonder it wasn't comfortable.
p3.32.1: Since it's come to this, let's just make a whole night of it!
p3.33.0: You are not listening at all, aren't you...
p3.35.0: What does any of this have to do with massage?
p3.36.1: either way it felt good, so isn't that what matters?
p3.36.2: Go change and come back, hurry up!
p3.39.2: Looks like those hands of yours completely ran out of power, huh?
p3.41.1: I lost, so it's now yours...
p3.43.0: You can massage wherever you want...
p3.43.1: I don't have the strength to resist...
p3.44.0: Though doing it all night would be a problem...
p3.46.1: Looks like your hands finally gave out~
p3.49.1: We didn't even make a bet...
p3.52.0: What are you two doing here?
p3.52.1: Shouldn't you be at the debrief.
p3.52.2: The others were looking for you two.
p3.54.0: And we end up leaving at 9 after all...
p3.54.1: I knew it'd turn out like this.
p3.55.2: we could've slacked off here a bit longer.
p3.56.0: We were never gonna do any work before 9 anyway.
p3.56.1: We slacked off plenty, if you ask me...
p3.57.0: I could've spent more time hanging out with you, that's the thing!
p3.60.0: This shitty ass company calling 9 PM 'right on time'...
p3.61.0: We stay up all night on operations anyway,
p3.61.1: a day when you can go home is a good day!
p3.62.0: Then at least on those days they could let us out early! Jeez...
